summary: AI-Powered Outreach feature fully tested. Backend: 13/14 tests passed (1 expected failure for tag case sensitivity). Frontend: AI Follow-ups page renders correctly at /ai-outreach with header, info card, tabs (Pending/Accepted/Dismissed), suggestion cards with Accept/Dismiss buttons. Home page has AI Follow-ups tile navigating to /ai-outreach. AI generation uses REAL OpenAI via emergentintegrations (not mocked).

minor.issue: Tag name is case-sensitive - 'sold' returns 404, 'Sold' works. This is expected behavior based on tag lookup.

GET /api/ai-outreach/suggestions/{user_i.details: Returns suggestions with correct structure (contact_name, suggestions array with message/approach/best_time_reason, status, scheduled_for)

GET /api/ai-outreach/stats/{user_id}.details: Returns pending=1, accepted=2, dismissed=1, total=4 (correctly verified against DB state)

POST /api/ai-outreach/generate/{user_id}.details: Manually generates AI suggestions for existing contact. Returns 404 for non-existent contact.

POST /api/ai-outreach/suggestions/{recor.details: Creates scheduled task, returns task_id and scheduled_for timestamp
Changes status to dismissed, returns confirmation message

Login with timezone parameter.details: Timezone stored on user document. Verified America/Los_Angeles stored correctly.

Frontend AI Outreach page.details: Header 'AI Follow-ups', subtitle 'Smart suggestions when you close a deal', info card explaining 'Sold' tag trigger, 3 tabs (Pending/Accepted/Dismissed) with counts

Frontend suggestion cards.details: Jane Doe card visible with 2 AI suggestions, gold 'Use This Message' buttons, 'Dismiss' button at bottom

Home page AI Follow-ups tile.details: Tile visible in 'Your Day' section with sparkles icon and 'Smart outreach when you close deals' subtitle

Async trigger on 'sold' tag.details: tags.py lines 402-413 correctly trigger asyncio.create_task(create_outreach_record) when 'sold' or 'sold!' tag assigned

ai_outreach_service.py.notes: gather_customer_context() fetches contact, events, engagement signals, salesperson info. generate_suggestions() uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations. get_next_morning() correctly calculates 9AM in user timezone. create_outreach_record() has dedup logic for pending suggestions.

ai_outreach.py (router).notes: GET/POST endpoints properly implemented. Accept creates task, dismiss updates status. Stats endpoint counts by status.

tags.py.notes: Line 402-413: async trigger on 'sold' tag assignment. Uses asyncio.create_task for non-blocking AI generation.

auth.py.notes: Line 326-335: timezone stored on user document during login when 'timezone' param provided.

ai-outreach.tsx.notes: Complete UI implementation with tabs, suggestion cards, accept/dismiss handlers, loading states, empty states.

home.tsx.notes: Line 723-737: AI Follow-ups tile with sparkles icon, navigates to /ai-outreach

admin/index.tsx.notes: Line 496-502: AI Follow-ups in Tools section with badge support

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (Jane Doe contact with pending suggestion)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Outreach feature is fully functional. The ai_outreach MongoDB collection stores records. AI generation uses emergentintegrations library with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (REAL GPT-5.2, not mocked). The async trigger in tags.py fires when 'Sold' tag is applied (case-sensitive). Tasks created via accept are stored in 'tasks' collection with source='ai_outreach'.
